name: Asparagus-Egg Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook celery in butter. Blend in flour, salt, mustard, and pepper.
2. Add milk and bouillon granules. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
3. Stir in mushrooms. Set aside.
4. Cook the frozen asparagus according to package directions; drain thoroughly.
5. Reserve 1/2 cup of asparagus and 1 egg for garnish.
6. In a 10" x 6" x 2-inch baking dish, arrange the remaining asparagus and egg slices.
7. Pour sauce over all.
8. Bake, covered, at 375°F for 15 minutes.
9. Arrange the reserved asparagus and sliced egg atop the casserole.
10. Sprinkle with crushed crackers.
11. Bake, uncovered, for an additional 10 minutes.
